pages.title: Space War
pages.description:
Command spacecraft through intense space battles, managing energy shields and weapon cooldowns to outmaneuver enemy fleets. Engage in fast-paced dogfights featuring tactical positioning and targeting systems. Progress through increasingly difficult waves of alien attackers while upgrading your ship's offensive and defensive capabilities.

Key Features

• Energy shield management  
• Real-time space combat controls  
• Progressive enemy wave challenges  
• Ship upgrade customization  
• Sci-fi space warfare setting

pages.title: Space Wars Cartoon Coloring
pages.description:
Color cosmic battles with a vibrant palette in this interactive space-themed coloring experience. Players use a digital brush mechanic to fill dynamic cartoon starships and alien scenes with bright hues, aiming to complete each level by matching or inventing color schemes. Unlock new artwork progressively while navigating an imaginative outer space backdrop.

Key Features

• Digital brush coloring tool  
• Progressive artwork unlocking  
• Interactive cartoon starship scenes  
• Palette customization system  
• Space-themed visual designs

pages.title: Space Tanks: Arcade
pages.description:
Navigate futuristic tank arenas using precise arcade-style controls to blast through waves of enemies in space-themed battlegrounds. Players manage fast-paced combat with unique weapon power-ups while aiming to survive escalating enemy assaults. Each level challenges your reflexes and aiming skills in vibrant extraterrestrial environments.

Key Features

• Arcade tank movement mechanics  
• Weapon power-up collection system  
• Wave-based enemy progression  
• Time attack survival mode  
• Sci-fi space battle arenas

pages.title: Space Survival Rainbow Friends Monster
pages.description:
Navigate hostile environments using evasive movement to dodge roaming enemies in this survival game featuring a color-shifting hazard system. Manage your stamina and timing to withstand waves of rainbow-themed monsters while exploring mysterious biomes. The goal revolves around lasting as long as possible against unpredictable threats that demand quick reflexes and strategy.

• Progressive wave difficulty scaling

pages.title: Spaces Solitaire
pages.description:
Arrange cards by suit and rank to clear the tableau in this solitaire variant that challenges pattern recognition and strategic sequencing. Players build descending stacks with alternating colors while managing limited moves to reveal hidden cards, enhancing classic solitaire depth. Unique nested stack mechanic demands careful planning to unlock full clearance, appealing to casual gamers and younger players alike.

Key Features

• Classic alternating color stacking  
• Limited move management system  
• Nested stack reveal mechanic  
• Progressive tableau unlocking  
• Casual-friendly card visuals
